sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n246" key="a)gaqodosi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀγαθο-δοσία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">δόσις</etym>) <sense id="n246.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the giving of good,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0732.tlg004:707:19" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Aphr.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Metaph.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">707.19</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
